name: Envela Corp
summary: Envela Corporation is a recommerce and recycling company operating in the contiguous United States. It sources, resells, and recycles luxury hard assets including precious metals, jewelry, and bullion, as well as electronic devices and harvested parts through IT asset disposition (ITAD) services. The company sells through retail stores, online channels, and wholesale channels, serving both individual customers and business partners seeking asset disposition or product return services.
